headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on MSCI, Raises Price Target to $742
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Alexander Hess   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $700 to $742.

headline: MSCI (MSCI) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
summary: Investment analytics provider MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) will be reporting results this Tuesday before market hours. Here’s what to expect.
